task_description: Phase 75: Cross-App Gaming + Social Play - Create a @quant/cross-app-gaming package that enables the same game to be played across QuantChat, QuantMax random video, QuantNeon feed, and QuantMeet icebreakers. Includes game session management, universal leaderboard, cross-app hosting adapters, identity bridge (anonymous-then-consent-reveal), and minor safety enforcement.

verification.summary: typecheck passes, 72 tests pass across 5 test files, lint passes. Tests exercise real service logic including session lifecycle, host migration, anti-cheat validation, consent flows, and age-gated restrictions.
